task: Identify the ongoing competition that offers the highest prize and find the code that received the most votes in that competition.
graderReasoning: The agent identified an ongoing competition with the highest visible prize among ongoing entries: ARC Prize 2026 - ARC-AGI-3 at $850,000. This is supported by the competitions pages showing ongoing items with time remaining and ARC Prize 2026 - ARC-AGI-3 listed at $850,000, higher than other ongoing competitions shown (e.g. ARC-AGI-2 at $700,000, Paper Track at $450,000). The agent then opened that competition’s Code tab, changed sorting to “Most Votes,” and the notebook list showed the top entry as “ARC3 Sample Submission - Stochastic Goose” with 385 votes. Opening the notebook page confirmed the title and 385 votes. The final answer matches the evidence and includes correct links.
final_result_response:
The highest-prize ongoing Kaggle competition is:

**ARC Prize 2026 - ARC-AGI-3**  
Prize: **$850,000**  
Link: https://www.kaggle.com/competitions/arc-prize-2026-arc-agi-3

The most-voted code notebook in that competition is:

**ARC3 Sample Submission - Stochastic Goose** by **inversion**  
Votes: **385**  
Link: https://www.kaggle.com/code/inversion/arc3-sample-submission-stochastic-goose
action_history: Opening Kaggle: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.kaggle.com/');
Opening competition code tab: await page.locator('e335').click();
Sorting notebooks by votes: await page.locator('e530').click();
Returning to competitions list: await page.locator('e388').click();
Checking competition sort options: await page.locator('e853').click();
Sorting competitions by prize: await page.locator('e931').click();
